INSERT INTO pg_temp_8.__export_sql (ord, line) VALUES ('320', 'CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.lumi_checkin_candidates(p_hemisphere text, p_area text DEFAULT NULL::text, p_state text DEFAULT NULL::text, p_faro text DEFAULT NULL::text, p_capability text DEFAULT NULL::text, p_time_bucket text DEFAULT NULL::text)
 RETURNS TABLE(hypothesis_id uuid, experience_id uuid, life_area_key text, state_key text, faro_key text, capability_key text, expected_capability_key text, duration_min integer, specificity integer, priority integer)
 LANGUAGE sql
 STABLE SECURITY DEFINER
 SET search_path TO ''public''
AS $function$
  SELECT
    eh.id,
    eh.experience_id,
    eh.life_area_key,
    eh.state_key,
    eh.faro_key,
    eh.capability_key,
    eh.expected_capability_key,
    r.duration_min,
    (CASE WHEN eh.life_area_key IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
     + CASE WHEN eh.state_key IS NOT NULL OR eh.faro_key IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS specificity,
    eh.priority
  FROM public.experience_hypotheses eh
  JOIN public.experiences e
    ON e.id = eh.experience_id
   AND e.active = true
   AND e.editorial_status IN (''core_mvp'',''enrichment_mvp'')
  JOIN public.resources r
    ON r.id = e.primary_resource_id
   AND r.is_active = true
   AND r.status = ''active''
  WHERE eh.active = true
    AND eh.hemisphere_key = p_hemisphere
    AND (p_area IS NULL OR p_area = '''' OR eh.life_area_key = p_area OR eh.life_area_key IS NULL)
    AND (p_capability IS NULL OR p_capability = '''' OR eh.capability_key = p_capability)
    AND eh.expected_capability_key = eh.capability_key
    AND (
      (p_hemisphere = ''H1'' AND (p_state IS NULL OR p_state = '''' OR eh.state_key = p_state OR eh.state_key IS NULL))
      OR
      (p_hemisphere = ''H2'' AND (p_faro IS NULL OR p_faro = '''' OR eh.faro_key = p_faro OR eh.faro_key IS NULL))
    )
    AND (
      p_time_bucket IS NULL OR p_time_bucket = ''''
      OR r.duration_min <= public.lumi_max_minutes(p_time_bucket::public.time_bucket)
    );
$function$
');

INSERT INTO pg_temp_8.__export_sql (ord, line) VALUES ('321', 'CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.lumi_checkin_no_match(p_step text, p_hemisphere text, p_state jsonb DEFAULT ''{}''::jsonb)
 RETURNS jsonb
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
 STABLE SECURITY DEFINER
 SET search_path TO ''public''
AS $function$
DECLARE v_node jsonb;
BEGIN
  v_node := public.lumi_get_node(''CHECKIN_NO_MATCH'');
  RETURN v_node || jsonb_build_object(
    ''ok'',true,
    ''code'',''CHECKIN_NO_MATCH'',
    ''message'',CASE WHEN p_hemisphere=''H1''
      THEN ''No encontré una experiencia suficientemente adecuada para este momento. Prefiero no forzar una propuesta.''
      ELSE ''Todavía no tengo una experiencia adecuada para acompañarte bien en este recorrido.'' END,
    ''actions'',CASE WHEN p_hemisphere=''H1''
      THEN jsonb_build_array(
        jsonb_build_object(''label'',''Probar otra forma'',''action'',''start_checkin'',''variant'',''solid''),
        jsonb_build_object(''label'',''Explorar la Fuente'',''action'',''open_fuente'',''variant'',''outline''),
        jsonb_build_object(''label'',''Volver'',''action'',''go_home'',''variant'',''ghost''))
      ELSE jsonb_build_array(
        jsonb_build_object(''label'',''Elegir otro Faro'',''action'',''submit_h2_choose_area'',''variant'',''solid''),
        jsonb_build_object(''label'',''Explorar la Fuente'',''action'',''open_fuente'',''variant'',''outline''),
        jsonb_build_object(''label'',''Volver'',''action'',''go_home'',''variant'',''ghost'')) END,
    ''content_type'',''empty_presence'',
    ''content'',jsonb_build_object(''type'',''empty_presence'',''source'',''lumi'',''no_match_step'',p_step),
    ''state'',COALESCE(p_state,''{}''::jsonb)
  );
END;
$function$
');

INSERT INTO pg_temp_8.__export_sql (ord, line) VALUES ('322', 'CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.lumi_checkin_options(p_step text, p_user_id uuid, p_hemisphere text, p_area text DEFAULT NULL::text, p_state text DEFAULT NULL::text, p_faro text DEFAULT NULL::text, p_capability text DEFAULT NULL::text)
 RETURNS jsonb
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
 STABLE SECURITY DEFINER
 SET search_path TO ''public''
AS $function$
DECLARE
  v_options jsonb := ''[]''::jsonb;
BEGIN
  IF p_step = ''area'' AND p_hemisphere = ''H2'' THEN
    SELECT COALESCE(jsonb_agg(x.obj ORDER BY x.sort_order, x.key), ''[]''::jsonb)
    INTO v_options
    FROM (
      SELECT DISTINCT uc.sort_order, uc.key,
        jsonb_build_object(''value'',uc.key,''label'',uc.short_label,''hint'',uc.subtitle) obj
      FROM public.user_area_faros uaf
      JOIN public.ui_copy uc
        ON uc.domain=''area'' AND uc.lang=''es'' AND uc.key=uaf.area::text
      WHERE uaf.user_id=p_user_id AND uaf.status=''active''
        AND EXISTS (
          SELECT 1 FROM public.lumi_checkin_candidates(''H2'',uaf.area::text,NULL,uaf.faro_key,NULL,NULL)
        )
    ) x;

  ELSIF p_step = ''state'' AND p_hemisphere = ''H1'' THEN
    SELECT COALESCE(jsonb_agg(x.obj ORDER BY x.sort_order, x.key), ''[]''::jsonb)
    INTO v_options
    FROM (
      SELECT uc.sort_order, uc.key,
        jsonb_build_object(''value'',uc.key,''label'',uc.short_label,''hint'',uc.subtitle) obj
      FROM public.ui_copy uc
      WHERE uc.domain=''state'' AND uc.lang=''es''
        AND EXISTS (
          SELECT 1 FROM public.lumi_checkin_candidates(''H1'',NULL,uc.key,NULL,NULL,NULL)
        )
    ) x;

  ELSIF p_step = ''faro'' AND p_hemisphere = ''H2'' THEN
    SELECT COALESCE(jsonb_agg(x.obj ORDER BY x.updated_at DESC, x.label), ''[]''::jsonb)
    INTO v_options
    FROM (
      SELECT uaf.id, uaf.updated_at,
        COALESCE(uc.short_label,uaf.faro_text,uaf.faro_key) label,
        jsonb_build_object(
          ''value'',uaf.id::text,
          ''label'',COALESCE(uc.short_label,uaf.faro_text,uaf.faro_key),
          ''hint'',COALESCE(uc.helper_text,uc.subtitle,''''),
          ''faro_key'',uaf.faro_key,
          ''user_area_faro_id'',uaf.id::text
        ) obj
      FROM public.user_area_faros uaf
      LEFT JOIN public.ui_copy uc
        ON uc.domain=''faro'' AND uc.lang=''es'' AND uc.key=uaf.faro_key
      WHERE uaf.user_id=p_user_id
        AND uaf.area::text=p_area
        AND uaf.status=''active''
        AND EXISTS (
          SELECT 1 FROM public.lumi_checkin_candidates(''H2'',p_area,NULL,uaf.faro_key,NULL,NULL)
        )
    ) x;

  ELSIF p_step = ''capability'' THEN
    SELECT COALESCE(jsonb_agg(x.obj ORDER BY x.sort_order, x.key), ''[]''::jsonb)
    INTO v_options
    FROM (
      SELECT uc.sort_order, uc.key,
        jsonb_build_object(''value'',uc.key,''label'',uc.short_label,''hint'',uc.subtitle) obj
      FROM public.ui_copy uc
      WHERE uc.domain=''capability'' AND uc.lang=''es''
        AND EXISTS (
          SELECT 1 FROM public.lumi_checkin_candidates(
            p_hemisphere,p_area,p_state,p_faro,uc.key,NULL
          )
        )
    ) x;

  ELSIF p_step = ''time'' THEN
    SELECT COALESCE(jsonb_agg(x.obj ORDER BY x.sort_order, x.key), ''[]''::jsonb)
    INTO v_options
    FROM (
      SELECT uc.sort_order, uc.key,
        jsonb_build_object(''value'',uc.key,''label'',uc.short_label,''hint'',uc.subtitle) obj
      FROM public.ui_copy uc
      WHERE uc.domain=''time_bucket'' AND uc.lang=''es''
        AND EXISTS (
          SELECT 1 FROM public.lumi_checkin_candidates(
            p_hemisphere,p_area,p_state,p_faro,p_capability,uc.key
          )
        )
    ) x;
  END IF;

  RETURN COALESCE(v_options,''[]''::jsonb);
END;
$function$
');

INSERT INTO pg_temp_8.__export_sql (ord, line) VALUES ('341', 'CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.lumi_get_message(p_message_type text, p_moment_type text)
 RETURNS text
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
 STABLE
AS $function$
DECLARE
  v_text text;
BEGIN
  -- Random ponderado: -ln(random())/weight es el algoritmo estándar
  -- para weighted reservoir sampling. random_weight DEFAULT 1.
  SELECT message_text INTO v_text
  FROM public.lumen_messages
  WHERE message_type = p_message_type
    AND moment_type  = p_moment_type
    AND active = true
    AND (starts_at IS NULL OR starts_at <= now())
    AND (ends_at   IS NULL OR ends_at   >= now())
  ORDER BY -ln(greatest(random(), 0.0000001)) /
           greatest(coalesce(random_weight, 1), 1)
  LIMIT 1;

  RETURN v_text;
END;
$function$
');

INSERT INTO pg_temp_8.__export_sql (ord, line) VALUES ('349', 'CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.lumi_get_ui_options(p_domain text, p_parent_domain text DEFAULT NULL::text, p_parent_key text DEFAULT NULL::text, p_lang text DEFAULT ''es''::text)
 RETURNS TABLE(value text, label text, long_label text, helper_text text, sort_order integer)
 LANGUAGE sql
 STABLE
AS $function$
  SELECT
    uc.key AS value,
    uc.short_label AS label,
    uc.long_label,
    uc.helper_text,
    uc.sort_order
  FROM public.ui_copy uc
  WHERE uc.domain = p_domain
    AND uc.lang = p_lang
    AND (
      p_parent_domain IS NULL
      OR uc.parent_domain = p_parent_domain
    )
    AND (
      p_parent_key IS NULL
      OR uc.parent_key = p_parent_key
    )
  ORDER BY uc.sort_order NULLS LAST, uc.key;
$function$
');

INSERT INTO pg_temp_8.__export_sql (ord, line) VALUES ('338', 'CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.lumi_get_faros(p_user_id uuid)
 RETURNS jsonb
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
 SECURITY DEFINER
AS $function$
DECLARE
  v_faros jsonb;
BEGIN
  SELECT jsonb_agg(
    jsonb_build_object(
      ''area'',      uc.key,
      ''label'',     coalesce(uc.long_label, uc.short_label, uc.key),
      ''faro_text'', coalesce(f.faro_text, ''''),
      ''faro_key'',  coalesce(f.faro_key, ''''),
      ''has_faro'',  (f.faro_text IS NOT NULL AND f.faro_text != '''')
    )
    ORDER BY uc.sort_order
  )
  INTO v_faros
  FROM public.ui_copy uc
  LEFT JOIN public.user_area_faros f
         ON f.area::text = uc.key
        AND f.user_id    = p_user_id
  WHERE uc.domain = ''area''   -- correcto
    AND uc.lang   = ''es''
    AND uc.key    != '''';

  RETURN jsonb_build_object(
    ''type'',  ''faros_panel'',
    ''faros'', coalesce(v_faros, ''[]''::jsonb)
  );
END;
$function$
');

INSERT INTO pg_temp_8.__export_sql (ord, line) VALUES ('342', 'CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.lumi_get_node(p_code text)
 RETURNS jsonb
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
 SECURITY DEFINER
AS $function$
DECLARE
  v_node         public.lumen_nodes%rowtype;
  v_message      text;
  v_content_type text;
BEGIN
  SELECT *
  INTO v_node
  FROM public.lumen_nodes
  WHERE code = p_code
    AND coalesce(active, true) = true   -- ◀️ defensivo: NULL = activo
  ORDER BY priority ASC
  LIMIT 1;

  IF NOT FOUND THEN
    RETURN jsonb_build_object(
      ''ok'', false,
      ''error'', ''NODE_NOT_FOUND'',
      ''code'', p_code,
      ''message'', ''Estoy acá.'',
      ''actions'', ''[]''::jsonb,
      ''content_type'', ''empty_presence'',
      ''content'', jsonb_build_object(''type'', ''empty_presence'')
    );
  END IF;

  v_message := coalesce(v_node.message_text, '''');
  v_content_type := coalesce(v_node.content_json ->> ''type'', ''empty_presence'');

  RETURN jsonb_build_object(
    ''ok'', true,
    ''code'', v_node.code,
    ''title'', v_node.title,
    ''module'', v_node.module,
    ''node_type'', v_node.node_type,
    ''moment_type'', v_node.moment_type,
    ''message'', v_message,
    ''actions'', coalesce(v_node.actions_json, ''[]''::jsonb),
    ''content_type'', v_content_type,
    ''content'', coalesce(v_node.content_json, jsonb_build_object(''type'', ''empty_presence'')),
    ''metadata'', coalesce(v_node.metadata, ''{}''::jsonb)
  );
END;
$function$
');

INSERT INTO pg_temp_8.__export_sql (ord, line) VALUES ('343', 'CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.lumi_get_note_editor(p_user_id uuid, p_resource_id uuid)
 RETURNS jsonb
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
 SECURITY DEFINER
AS $function$
DECLARE
  v_note text := '''';
  v_area text := '''';
  v_title text;
BEGIN
  -- Leer nota y área actuales del item
  SELECT coalesce(si.note, ''''), coalesce(si.area::text, '''')
  INTO   v_note, v_area
  FROM   public.sanctuary_items si
  WHERE  si.resource_id = p_resource_id AND si.user_id = p_user_id
  LIMIT  1;

  -- Título del recurso para contexto
  SELECT coalesce(r.title, ''Recurso'')
  INTO   v_title
  FROM   public.resources r
  WHERE  r.id = p_resource_id;

  RETURN jsonb_build_object(
    ''type'',         ''note_editor'',
    ''resource_id'',  p_resource_id::text,
    ''title'',        coalesce(v_title, ''Recurso''),
    ''current_note'', v_note,
    ''current_area'', v_area
  );
END;
$function$
');

INSERT INTO pg_temp_8.__export_sql (ord, line) VALUES ('344', 'CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.lumi_get_presence_context(p_user_id uuid)
 RETURNS jsonb
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
 SECURITY DEFINER
AS $function$
DECLARE
  v_has_history           boolean := false;
  v_days_since            integer := 0;
  v_active_faros          jsonb := ''[]''::jsonb;
  v_last_faro_worked      jsonb := null;
  v_last_area_worked      text := null;
  v_last_cap_perceived    text := null;
  v_sanctuary_highlights  jsonb := ''[]''::jsonb;
  v_has_sanctuary         boolean := false;
  v_session_count         integer := 0;
BEGIN
  SELECT
    count(*),
    COALESCE(EXTRACT(day FROM (now() - max(s.created_at)))::integer, 0)
  INTO
    v_session_count,
    v_days_since
  FROM public.sessions s
  WHERE s.user_id = p_user_id
    AND s.mode = ''propose'';

  v_has_history := v_session_count > 0;

  SELECT COALESCE(
    jsonb_agg(
      jsonb_build_object(
        ''user_area_faro_id'', uaf.id::text,
        ''area'', uaf.area::text,
        ''faro_key'', uaf.faro_key,
        ''faro_label'', COALESCE(faro_uc.short_label, uaf.faro_key),
        ''faro_text'', COALESCE(uaf.faro_text, '''')
      )
      ORDER BY uaf.updated_at DESC
    ),
    ''[]''::jsonb
  )
  INTO v_active_faros
  FROM public.user_area_faros uaf
  LEFT JOIN public.ui_copy faro_uc
    ON faro_uc.domain = ''faro''
   AND faro_uc.lang = ''es''
   AND faro_uc.key = uaf.faro_key
  WHERE uaf.user_id = p_user_id
    AND uaf.faro_key IS NOT NULL
    AND uaf.faro_key <> '''';

  SELECT jsonb_build_object(
    ''user_area_faro_id'', er.user_area_faro_id::text,
    ''faro_key'', er.faro_key,
    ''faro_label'', COALESCE(faro_uc.short_label, er.faro_key),
    ''area'', er.life_area_key,
    ''last_run_at'', er.started_at
  )
  INTO v_last_faro_worked
  FROM public.experience_runs er
  LEFT JOIN public.ui_copy faro_uc
    ON faro_uc.domain = ''faro''
   AND faro_uc.lang = ''es''
   AND faro_uc.key = er.faro_key
  WHERE er.user_id = p_user_id
    AND er.faro_key IS NOT NULL
  ORDER BY er.started_at DESC
  LIMIT 1;

  SELECT er.life_area_key
  INTO v_last_area_worked
  FROM public.experience_runs er
  WHERE er.user_id = p_user_id
    AND er.life_area_key IS NOT NULL
  ORDER BY er.started_at DESC
  LIMIT 1;

  SELECT uc.subtitle
  INTO v_last_cap_perceived
  FROM public.experience_runs er
  JOIN public.ui_copy uc
    ON uc.domain = ''capability''
   AND uc.lang = ''es''
   AND uc.key = er.perceived_capability_key
  WHERE er.user_id = p_user_id
    AND er.perceived_capability_key IS NOT NULL
  ORDER BY er.started_at DESC
  LIMIT 1;

  SELECT count(*) > 0
  INTO v_has_sanctuary
  FROM public.sanctuary_items
  WHERE user_id = p_user_id
    AND experience_run_id IS NOT NULL;

  IF v_has_sanctuary THEN
    SELECT COALESCE(jsonb_agg(item ORDER BY item->>''created_at'' DESC), ''[]''::jsonb)
    INTO v_sanctuary_highlights
    FROM (
      SELECT jsonb_build_object(
        ''sanctuary_item_id'', si.id::text,
        ''title'', COALESCE(e.title, r.title, ''''),
        ''faro_key'', si.faro_key,
        ''faro_label'', COALESCE(faro_uc.short_label, si.faro_key, ''''),
        ''expected_capability_key'', er.expected_capability_key,
        ''perceived_capability_key'', er.perceived_capability_key,
        ''created_at'', si.created_at
      ) AS item
      FROM public.sanctuary_items si
      LEFT JOIN public.experiences e
        ON e.id = si.experience_id
      LEFT JOIN public.resources r
        ON r.id = si.resource_id
      LEFT JOIN public.experience_runs er
        ON er.id = si.experience_run_id
      LEFT JOIN public.ui_copy faro_uc
        ON faro_uc.domain = ''faro''
       AND faro_uc.lang = ''es''
       AND faro_uc.key = si.faro_key
      WHERE si.user_id = p_user_id
        AND si.experience_run_id IS NOT NULL
      ORDER BY si.created_at DESC
      LIMIT 2
    ) sub;
  END IF;

  RETURN jsonb_build_object(
    ''has_history'', v_has_history,
    ''session_count'', v_session_count,
    ''days_since_last_session'', v_days_since,
    ''active_faros'', v_active_faros,
    ''last_faro_worked'', v_last_faro_worked,
    ''last_area_worked'', v_last_area_worked,
    ''last_capability_perceived'', v_last_cap_perceived,
    ''sanctuary_highlights'', v_sanctuary_highlights,
    ''has_sanctuary_items'', v_has_sanctuary
  );
END;
$function$
');

INSERT INTO pg_temp_8.__export_sql (ord, line) VALUES ('345', 'CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.lumi_get_resource_card(p_user_id uuid, p_resource_id uuid, p_session_id uuid DEFAULT NULL::uuid, p_is_from text DEFAULT ''lumi''::text)
 RETURNS jsonb
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
 SECURITY DEFINER
AS $function$
DECLARE
  v_r record;
BEGIN
  SELECT
    r.id,
    r.title,
    r.description_short,
    r.when_it_helps,
    r.what_it_is_not,
    r.format::text AS format,
    r.duration_min,
    r.source_kind,
    r.url,
    r.why_now,
    r.minimum_step,
    r.after_prompt,
    r.author,
    r.provider
  INTO v_r
  FROM public.resources r
  WHERE r.id = p_resource_id
    AND r.is_active = true
    AND r.status = ''active'';

  IF NOT FOUND THEN
    RETURN jsonb_build_object(
      ''type'', ''resource_card'',
      ''resource_id'', COALESCE(p_resource_id::text, ''''),
      ''title'', ''Recurso no disponible'',
      ''description_short'', '''',
      ''is_from'', COALESCE(p_is_from, ''lumi''),
      ''session_id'', COALESCE(p_session_id::text, '''')
    );
  END IF;

  RETURN jsonb_build_object(
    ''type'',              ''resource_card'',
    ''resource_id'',       v_r.id::text,
    ''title'',             COALESCE(v_r.title, ''Recurso''),
    ''description_short'', COALESCE(v_r.description_short, ''''),
    ''when_it_helps'',     COALESCE(v_r.when_it_helps, ''''),
    ''what_it_is_not'',    COALESCE(v_r.what_it_is_not, ''''),
    ''format'',            COALESCE(v_r.format, ''''),
    ''duration_min'',      COALESCE(v_r.duration_min, 0),
    ''source_kind'',       COALESCE(v_r.source_kind, ''external_url''),
    ''url'',               COALESCE(v_r.url, ''''),
    ''why_now'',           COALESCE(v_r.why_now, ''''),
    ''minimum_step'',      COALESCE(v_r.minimum_step, ''''),
    ''after_prompt'',      COALESCE(v_r.after_prompt, ''''),
    ''author'',            COALESCE(v_r.author, ''''),
    ''provider'',          COALESCE(v_r.provider, ''''),
    ''cta_label'',         ''Empezar ahora'',
    ''secondary_cta_label'', ''Probemos otra cosa'',
    ''is_from'',           COALESCE(p_is_from, ''lumi''),
    ''session_id'',        COALESCE(p_session_id::text, '''')
  );
END;
$function$
');

INSERT INTO pg_temp_8.__export_sql (ord, line) VALUES ('346', 'CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.lumi_get_sanctuary(p_user_id uuid, p_area text DEFAULT ''''::text, p_nota text DEFAULT ''''::text, p_orden text DEFAULT ''recientes''::text)
 RETURNS jsonb
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
 SECURITY DEFINER
AS $function$
BEGIN
  RETURN public.lumi_open_sanctuary(jsonb_build_object(
    ''user_id'',          p_user_id::text,

    ''filter_format'',    '''',
    ''filter_has_note'',  CASE
                          WHEN p_nota = ''con_nota'' THEN ''yes''

                          ELSE ''''
                        END

$function$
');

INSERT INTO pg_temp_8.__export_sql (ord, line) VALUES ('347', 'CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.lumi_get_sanctuary_item(p_item_id uuid, p_user_id uuid)
 RETURNS jsonb
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
 SECURITY DEFINER
AS $function$
DECLARE
  v_item   record;
  v_r      record;
  v_e      record;
  v_cap_expected record;
  v_cap_perceived record;
  v_faro_label text;
BEGIN
  SELECT
    si.id,
    si.note,
    si.life_area_key,
    si.resource_id,
    si.help_signal,
    si.experience_run_id,
    si.experience_id,
    si.expected_capability_key,
    si.perceived_capability_key,
    si.faro_key,
    si.faro_text_snapshot,
    si.hypothesis_json,
    si.created_at
  INTO v_item
  FROM public.sanctuary_items si
  WHERE si.id = p_item_id
    AND si.user_id = p_user_id
    AND si.experience_run_id IS NOT NULL;

  IF NOT FOUND THEN
    RETURN NULL;
  END IF;

  SELECT
    r.id,
    r.title,
    r.description_short,
    r.format::text,
    r.duration_min,
    r.source_kind,
    r.url,
    r.when_it_helps,
    r.why_now,
    r.minimum_step,
    r.after_prompt
  INTO v_r
  FROM public.resources r
  WHERE r.id = v_item.resource_id;

  SELECT
    e.id,
    e.title,
    e.objective,
    e.pre_text,
    e.post_text
  INTO v_e
  FROM public.experiences e
  WHERE e.id = v_item.experience_id;

  IF v_item.expected_capability_key IS NOT NULL THEN
    SELECT
      uc.short_label AS need_label,
      uc.subtitle AS effect_label
    INTO v_cap_expected
    FROM public.ui_copy uc
    WHERE uc.domain = ''capability''
      AND uc.lang = ''es''
      AND uc.key = v_item.expected_capability_key
    LIMIT 1;
  END IF;

  IF v_item.perceived_capability_key IS NOT NULL THEN
    SELECT
      uc.short_label AS need_label,
      uc.subtitle AS effect_label
    INTO v_cap_perceived
    FROM public.ui_copy uc
    WHERE uc.domain = ''capability''
      AND uc.lang = ''es''
      AND uc.key = v_item.perceived_capability_key
    LIMIT 1;
  END IF;

  IF v_item.faro_key IS NOT NULL THEN
    v_faro_label := COALESCE(
      v_item.faro_text_snapshot,
      (
        SELECT uc.short_label
        FROM public.ui_copy uc
        WHERE uc.domain = ''faro''
          AND uc.lang = ''es''
          AND uc.key = v_item.faro_key
        LIMIT 1
      )
    );
  END IF;

  RETURN jsonb_build_object(
    ''type'', ''activity_detail'',
    ''detail_kind'', ''sanctuary'',
    ''source'', ''sanctuary'',
    ''sanctuary_item_id'', v_item.id::text,
    ''experience_run_id'', v_item.experience_run_id::text,
    ''experience_id'', COALESCE(v_item.experience_id::text, ''''),
    ''resource_id'', COALESCE(v_r.id::text, ''''),
    ''title'', COALESCE(v_e.title, v_r.title, ''Experiencia guardada''),
    ''description_short'', COALESCE(v_r.description_short, v_e.objective, ''''),
    ''format'', COALESCE(v_r.format, ''—''),
    ''duration_min'', COALESCE(v_r.duration_min::text, ''—''),
    ''source_kind'', COALESCE(v_r.source_kind, ''external_url''),
    ''url'', COALESCE(v_r.url, ''''),
    ''pre_text'', COALESCE(v_e.pre_text, ''''),
    ''post_text'', COALESCE(v_e.post_text, ''''),
    ''when_it_helps'', COALESCE(v_r.when_it_helps, ''''),
    ''why_now'', COALESCE(v_r.why_now, ''''),
    ''minimum_step'', COALESCE(v_r.minimum_step, ''''),
    ''after_prompt'', COALESCE(v_r.after_prompt, ''''),
    ''note'', COALESCE(v_item.note, ''''),
    ''has_note'', (v_item.note IS NOT NULL AND v_item.note <> ''''),
    ''life_area_key'', COALESCE(v_item.life_area_key, ''''),
    ''area_label'',
      CASE
        WHEN v_item.life_area_key IS NOT NULL AND v_item.life_area_key <> ''''
        THEN public.lumi_area_label(v_item.life_area_key)
        ELSE ''''
      END,
    ''help_signal'', COALESCE(v_item.help_signal, ''''),
    ''saved_at'', v_item.created_at,
    ''expected_capability_key'', COALESCE(v_item.expected_capability_key, ''''),
    ''expected_capability_label'', COALESCE(v_cap_expected.need_label, ''''),
    ''expected_effect_label'', COALESCE(v_cap_expected.effect_label, ''''),
    ''perceived_capability_key'', COALESCE(v_item.perceived_capability_key, ''''),
    ''perceived_capability_label'', COALESCE(v_cap_perceived.need_label, ''''),
    ''perceived_effect_label'', COALESCE(v_cap_perceived.effect_label, ''''),
    ''convergence'',
      (
        v_item.expected_capability_key = v_item.perceived_capability_key
        AND v_item.expected_capability_key IS NOT NULL
      ),
    ''faro_key'', COALESCE(v_item.faro_key, ''''),
    ''faro_label'', COALESCE(v_faro_label, '''')
  );
END;
$function$
');

INSERT INTO pg_temp_8.__export_sql (ord, line) VALUES ('358', 'CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.lumi_open_circulos(p_params jsonb)

INSERT INTO pg_temp_8.__export_sql (ord, line) VALUES ('356', 'CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.lumi_normalize_experience_run_context()
 RETURNS trigger
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
 SECURITY DEFINER
AS $function$
BEGIN
  NEW.metadata :=

         ''resource_id'',         coalesce(p_params->>''resource_id'',

         ''sanctuary_item_id'',   coalesce(p_params->>''sanctuary_item_id'',

       ))

INSERT INTO pg_temp_8.__export_sql (ord, line) VALUES ('360', 'CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.lumi_open_experience(p_params jsonb)
 RETURNS jsonb
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
 SECURITY DEFINER
AS $function$
DECLARE
  v_user_id             uuid;
  v_session_id          uuid;
  v_experience_id       uuid;
  v_experience          record;
  v_resource            record;
  v_node                jsonb;
  v_run_id              uuid;
  v_session_hemisphere  text;
  v_session_area        text;
  v_session_state       text;
  v_session_faro_key    text;
  v_session_uaf_id      uuid;
  v_session_faro_text   text;
  v_session_capability  text;
  v_session_format      text;
  v_selected_capability text;
  v_primary_area        text;
  v_primary_capability  text;
  v_hypothesis_json     jsonb;
BEGIN
  p_params        := public.lumi_normalize_params(COALESCE(p_params, ''{}''::jsonb));
  v_user_id       := NULLIF(TRIM(p_params->>''user_id''), '''')::uuid;
  v_session_id    := NULLIF(TRIM(p_params->>''session_id''), '''')::uuid;
  v_experience_id := NULLIF(TRIM(COALESCE(p_params->>''experience_id'', p_params->>''id'')), '''')::uuid;

  IF v_experience_id IS NULL OR v_user_id IS NULL THEN
    RETURN public.lumi_get_node(''HOME_DEFAULT'')
      || jsonb_build_object(
        ''ok'', false,
        ''error'', ''experience_id_o_user_id_requerido'',
        ''state'', ''{}''::jsonb
      );
  END IF;

  SELECT
    e.id,
    e.code,
    e.title,
    e.pre_text,
    e.post_text,
    e.primary_resource_id,
    e.expected_capability_key,
    e.hemisphere_key,
    e.primary_life_area_key,
    e.primary_capability_key
  INTO v_experience
  FROM public.experiences e
  WHERE e.id = v_experience_id
    AND e.active = true
    AND e.editorial_status IN (''core_mvp'', ''enrichment_mvp'');

  IF NOT FOUND THEN
    RETURN public.lumi_get_node(''HOME_DEFAULT'')
      || jsonb_build_object(
        ''ok'', false,
        ''error'', ''experiencia_no_visible_en_mvp'',
        ''state'', ''{}''::jsonb
      );
  END IF;

  SELECT
    r.id,
    r.title,
    r.url,
    r.source_kind,
    r.format,
    r.duration_min
  INTO v_resource
  FROM public.resources r
  WHERE r.id = v_experience.primary_resource_id
    AND r.is_active = true
    AND r.status = ''active'';

  IF NOT FOUND THEN
    RETURN public.lumi_get_node(''HOME_DEFAULT'')
      || jsonb_build_object(
        ''ok'', false,
        ''error'', ''recurso_primario_no_disponible'',
        ''state'', ''{}''::jsonb
      );
  END IF;

  IF v_session_id IS NOT NULL THEN
    SELECT
      s.hemisphere_key,
      s.area::text,
      s.state_key,
      s.faro_key,
      s.user_area_faro_id,
      COALESCE(uaf.faro_text, faro_uc.short_label, s.faro_key),
      s.selected_capability_key,
      s.current_format_preference
    INTO
      v_session_hemisphere,
      v_session_area,
      v_session_state,
      v_session_faro_key,
      v_session_uaf_id,
      v_session_faro_text,
      v_session_capability,
      v_session_format
    FROM public.sessions s
    LEFT JOIN public.user_area_faros uaf
      ON uaf.id = s.user_area_faro_id
    LEFT JOIN public.ui_copy faro_uc
      ON faro_uc.domain = ''faro''
     AND faro_uc.lang = ''es''
     AND faro_uc.key = s.faro_key
    WHERE s.id = v_session_id
      AND s.user_id = v_user_id;
  END IF;

  v_selected_capability := COALESCE(
    NULLIF(p_params->>''filter_necesito'', ''''),
    NULLIF(p_params->>''filter_capability'', ''''),
    NULLIF(p_params->>''capability_key'', ''''),
    v_session_capability,
    v_experience.primary_capability_key,
    v_experience.expected_capability_key
  );

  v_primary_capability := COALESCE(
    v_selected_capability,
    v_experience.primary_capability_key,
    v_experience.expected_capability_key
  );

  v_primary_area := COALESCE(
    NULLIF(v_session_area, ''''),
    NULLIF(v_experience.primary_life_area_key, '''')
  );

  v_hypothesis_json := jsonb_build_object(
    ''source'',                  COALESCE(NULLIF(p_params->>''source'', ''''), ''fuente''),
    ''experience_id'',           v_experience.id,
    ''selected_capability_key'', v_selected_capability,
    ''expected_capability_key'', v_experience.expected_capability_key,
    ''primary_capability_key'',  v_primary_capability,
    ''primary_life_area_key'',   v_primary_area,
    ''hemisphere_key'',          COALESCE(v_session_hemisphere, v_experience.hemisphere_key),
    ''session_id'',              v_session_id,
    ''opened_at'',               now()
  );

  INSERT INTO public.experience_runs (
    user_id,
    session_id,
    experience_id,
    resource_id,
    hemisphere_key,
    life_area_key,
    primary_life_area_key,
    state_key,
    faro_key,
    user_area_faro_id,
    faro_text_snapshot,
    selected_capability_key,
    expected_capability_key,
    primary_capability_key,
    current_format_preference,
    hypothesis_json,
    started_at,
    saved_to_sanctuary
  ) VALUES (
    v_user_id,
    v_session_id,
    v_experience.id,
    v_resource.id,
    COALESCE(v_session_hemisphere, v_experience.hemisphere_key),
    v_primary_area,
    v_primary_area,
    v_session_state,
    v_session_faro_key,
    v_session_uaf_id,
    v_session_faro_text,
    v_selected_capability,
    v_experience.expected_capability_key,
    v_primary_capability,
    v_session_format,
    v_hypothesis_json,
    now(),
    false
  )
  RETURNING id INTO v_run_id;

  v_node := public.lumi_get_node(''EXPERIENCE_PRE'');

  RETURN jsonb_build_object(
    ''ok'', true,
    ''code'', ''EXPERIENCE_PRE'',
    ''message'', COALESCE(v_experience.pre_text, v_node->>''message'', ''Cuando estés listo, empezamos.''),
    ''actions'', COALESCE(v_node->''actions'', ''[]''::jsonb),
    ''content_type'', ''empty_presence'',
    ''content'', jsonb_build_object(
      ''type'', ''empty_presence'',
      ''experience_id'', v_experience.id::text,
      ''experience_code'', v_experience.code,
      ''run_id'', v_run_id::text,
      ''experience_run_id'', v_run_id::text,
      ''capability_key'', v_selected_capability,
      ''expected_capability_key'', v_experience.expected_capability_key,
      ''primary_capability_key'', v_primary_capability,
      ''primary_life_area_key'', v_primary_area,
      ''resource_id'', v_resource.id::text,
      ''resource_title'', v_resource.title,
      ''resource_format'', v_resource.format::text,
      ''resource_url'', v_resource.url,
      ''post_text'', v_experience.post_text
    ),
    ''state'', jsonb_build_object(
      ''currentResourceId'', v_resource.id::text,
      ''currentExperienceRunId'', v_run_id::text,
      ''contentSource'', COALESCE(NULLIF(p_params->>''source'', ''''), ''fuente'')
    )
  );
END;
$function$
');

INSERT INTO pg_temp_8.__export_sql (ord, line) VALUES ('362', 'CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.lumi_open_faros(p_params jsonb)
 RETURNS jsonb
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
 SECURITY DEFINER
 SET search_path TO ''public''
AS $function$
DECLARE v_user_id uuid; v_faros jsonb; v_available jsonb; v_node jsonb;
BEGIN
  p_params:=public.lumi_normalize_params(COALESCE(p_params,''{}''::jsonb));
  v_user_id:=NULLIF(trim(p_params->>''user_id''),'''')::uuid;

  SELECT COALESCE(jsonb_agg(jsonb_build_object(
    ''id'',uaf.id::text,''area'',uaf.area::text,''area_label'',COALESCE(auc.short_label,uaf.area::text),
    ''faro_key'',uaf.faro_key,''label'',COALESCE(fuc.short_label,uaf.faro_text,uaf.faro_key),
    ''hint'',COALESCE(fuc.helper_text,fuc.subtitle,''''),''status'',uaf.status,
    ''activated_at'',uaf.activated_at,''paused_at'',uaf.paused_at,''closed_at'',uaf.closed_at,
    ''close_reason'',COALESCE(uaf.close_reason,''''),''close_reflection'',COALESCE(uaf.close_reflection,'''')
  ) ORDER BY auc.sort_order,uaf.status,uaf.updated_at DESC),''[]''::jsonb)
  INTO v_faros
  FROM public.user_area_faros uaf
  LEFT JOIN public.ui_copy auc ON auc.domain=''area'' AND auc.lang=''es'' AND auc.key=uaf.area::text
  LEFT JOIN public.ui_copy fuc ON fuc.domain=''faro'' AND fuc.lang=''es'' AND fuc.key=uaf.faro_key
  WHERE uaf.user_id=v_user_id;

  SELECT COALESCE(jsonb_agg(jsonb_build_object(
    ''area'',uc.parent_key,''area_label'',COALESCE(auc.short_label,uc.parent_key),
    ''faro_key'',uc.key,''label'',uc.short_label,''hint'',COALESCE(uc.helper_text,uc.subtitle,''''),
    ''action'',''activate_faro'',''value'',uc.key
  ) ORDER BY auc.sort_order,uc.sort_order),''[]''::jsonb)
  INTO v_available
  FROM public.ui_copy uc
  LEFT JOIN public.ui_copy auc ON auc.domain=''area'' AND auc.lang=''es'' AND auc.key=uc.parent_key
  WHERE uc.domain=''faro'' AND uc.lang=''es'' AND uc.parent_domain=''area''
    AND NOT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM public.user_area_faros uaf WHERE uaf.user_id=v_user_id AND uaf.area::text=uc.parent_key AND uaf.faro_key=uc.key);

  v_node:=public.lumi_get_node(''SANCTUARY_FAROS'');
  RETURN v_node||jsonb_build_object(''ok'',true,''code'',''SANCTUARY_FAROS'',
    ''message'',CASE WHEN jsonb_array_length(v_faros)=0 THEN ''Podemos empezar dando forma a los Faros que hoy querés tener presentes.'' ELSE ''Estos son los Faros que hoy forman parte de tu territorio.'' END,
    ''actions'',jsonb_build_array(jsonb_build_object(''label'',''Volver al Santuario'',''action'',''open_sanctuary'',''variant'',''ghost'')),
    ''content_type'',''faros_panel'',''content'',jsonb_build_object(''type'',''faros_panel'',''faros'',v_faros,''available_tags'',v_available,''privacy_hint'',''Solo vos podés ver este espacio.''),
    ''state'',jsonb_build_object(''contentSource'',''sanctuary'',''moduleColor'',''#B88820''));
END; $function$
');

INSERT INTO pg_temp_8.__export_sql (ord, line) VALUES ('364', 'CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.lumi_open_note_editor(p_params jsonb)
 RETURNS jsonb
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
 SECURITY DEFINER
AS $function$
DECLARE
  v_user_id           uuid;
  v_sanctuary_item_id uuid;
  v_resource_id       uuid;
  v_node              jsonb;
  v_item              record;
  v_options           jsonb;
BEGIN
  p_params := COALESCE(p_params, ''{}''::jsonb);

  v_user_id := NULLIF(TRIM(COALESCE(p_params->>''user_id'', '''')), '''')::uuid;

  v_sanctuary_item_id := NULLIF(
    TRIM(BOTH '''''''' FROM TRIM(COALESCE(p_params->>''sanctuary_item_id'', ''''))),
    ''''
  )::uuid;

  v_resource_id := NULLIF(
    TRIM(BOTH '''''''' FROM TRIM(COALESCE(p_params->>''resource_id'', ''''))),
    ''''
  )::uuid;

  IF v_user_id IS NULL THEN
    RETURN public.lumi_open_sanctuary(''{}''::jsonb);
  END IF;

  IF v_sanctuary_item_id IS NOT NULL THEN
    SELECT
      si.id AS sanctuary_item_id,
      COALESCE(si.resource_id, er.resource_id, e.primary_resource_id) AS resource_id,
      si.experience_run_id,
      COALESCE(e.title, r.title, ''Experiencia guardada'') AS title,
      COALESCE(si.note, si.reflection_text, er.reflection_text, '''') AS current_note,
      COALESCE(si.life_area_key, er.life_area_key, '''') AS current_area
    INTO v_item
    FROM public.sanctuary_items si
    JOIN public.experience_runs er
      ON er.id = si.experience_run_id
    LEFT JOIN public.experiences e
      ON e.id = COALESCE(si.experience_id, er.experience_id)
    LEFT JOIN public.resources r
      ON r.id = COALESCE(si.resource_id, er.resource_id, e.primary_resource_id)
    WHERE si.id = v_sanctuary_item_id
      AND si.user_id = v_user_id
      AND si.experience_run_id IS NOT NULL
    LIMIT 1;
  ELSE
    SELECT
      si.id AS sanctuary_item_id,
      COALESCE(si.resource_id, er.resource_id, e.primary_resource_id) AS resource_id,
      si.experience_run_id,
      COALESCE(e.title, r.title, ''Experiencia guardada'') AS title,
      COALESCE(si.note, si.reflection_text, er.reflection_text, '''') AS current_note,
      COALESCE(si.life_area_key, er.life_area_key, '''') AS current_area
    INTO v_item
    FROM public.sanctuary_items si
    JOIN public.experience_runs er
      ON er.id = si.experience_run_id
    LEFT JOIN public.experiences e
      ON e.id = COALESCE(si.experience_id, er.experience_id)
    LEFT JOIN public.resources r
      ON r.id = COALESCE(si.resource_id, er.resource_id, e.primary_resource_id)
    WHERE si.user_id = v_user_id
      AND si.experience_run_id IS NOT NULL
      AND (
        v_resource_id IS NULL
        OR COALESCE(si.resource_id, er.resource_id, e.primary_resource_id) = v_resource_id
      )
    ORDER BY si.updated_at DESC NULLS LAST, si.created_at DESC
    LIMIT 1;
  END IF;

  IF NOT FOUND THEN
    RETURN public.lumi_open_sanctuary(
      jsonb_build_object(''user_id'', v_user_id::text)
    );
  END IF;

  SELECT jsonb_agg(
    jsonb_build_object(
      ''value'', uc.key,
      ''label'', uc.short_label,
      ''hint'',  uc.subtitle
    )
    ORDER BY uc.sort_order
  )
  INTO v_options
  FROM public.ui_copy uc
  WHERE uc.domain = ''area''
    AND uc.lang = ''es'';

  v_node := public.lumi_get_node(''SANCTUARY_NOTE'');

  RETURN jsonb_build_object(
    ''ok'',           true,
    ''code'',         ''SANCTUARY_NOTE'',
    ''message'',      COALESCE(v_node->>''message'', ''Podés dejar una nota para vos.''),
    ''actions'',      COALESCE(v_node->''actions'', ''[]''::jsonb),
    ''content_type'', ''note_editor'',
    ''content'',      jsonb_build_object(
                      ''type'',               ''note_editor'',
                      ''resource_id'',        COALESCE(v_item.resource_id::text, ''''),
                      ''sanctuary_item_id'',  v_item.sanctuary_item_id::text,
                      ''experience_run_id'',  COALESCE(v_item.experience_run_id::text, ''''),
                      ''title'',              COALESCE(v_item.title, ''Experiencia guardada''),
                      ''current_note'',       COALESCE(v_item.current_note, ''''),
                      ''current_area'',       COALESCE(v_item.current_area, ''''),
                      ''area_options'',       COALESCE(v_options, ''[]''::jsonb)
                    ),
    ''state'',        jsonb_build_object(
                      ''currentResourceId'',      COALESCE(v_item.resource_id::text, ''''),
                      ''currentSanctuaryItemId'', v_item.sanctuary_item_id::text,
                      ''currentExperienceRunId'', COALESCE(v_item.experience_run_id::text, ''''),
                      ''contentSource'',          ''sanctuary'',
                      ''moduleColor'',            ''#B88820''
                    )
  );
END;
$function$
');

INSERT INTO pg_temp_8.__export_sql (ord, line) VALUES ('372', 'CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.lumi_open_sanctuary_journeys(p_params jsonb)
 RETURNS jsonb
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
 SECURITY DEFINER
 SET search_path TO ''public''
AS $function$
DECLARE v_user_id uuid; v_items jsonb; v_node jsonb;
BEGIN
 p_params:=public.lumi_normalize_params(COALESCE(p_params,''{}''::jsonb)); v_user_id:=NULLIF(trim(p_params->>''user_id''),'''')::uuid;
 SELECT COALESCE(jsonb_agg(jsonb_build_object(''id'',uaf.id::text,''title'',COALESCE(uc.short_label,uaf.faro_text,uaf.faro_key),
   ''subtitle'',count(er.id)::text||'' experiencias · ''||CASE uaf.status WHEN ''active'' THEN ''activo'' WHEN ''paused'' THEN ''pausado'' ELSE ''cerrado'' END,
   ''action'',''open_faro_journey'',''value'',uaf.id::text) ORDER BY max(er.started_at) DESC NULLS LAST),''[]''::jsonb)
 INTO v_items
 FROM public.user_area_faros uaf
 JOIN public.experience_runs er ON er.user_area_faro_id=uaf.id AND er.user_id=v_user_id AND er.hemisphere_key=''H2''
 LEFT JOIN public.ui_copy uc ON uc.domain=''faro'' AND uc.lang=''es'' AND uc.key=uaf.faro_key
 WHERE uaf.user_id=v_user_id GROUP BY uaf.id,uc.short_label;
 v_node:=public.lumi_get_node(''SANCTUARY_JOURNEYS'');
 RETURN v_node||jsonb_build_object(''ok'',true,''message'',''Acá podemos volver sobre los caminos que venís recorriendo.'',
  ''actions'',jsonb_build_array(jsonb_build_object(''label'',''Volver al Santuario'',''action'',''open_sanctuary'',''variant'',''ghost'')),
  ''content_type'',''item_list'',''content'',jsonb_build_object(''type'',''item_list'',''source'',''sanctuary_journeys'',''items'',v_items),
  ''state'',jsonb_build_object(''contentSource'',''sanctuary'',''moduleColor'',''#B88820''));
END; $function$
');

INSERT INTO pg_temp_8.__export_sql (ord, line) VALUES ('373', 'CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.lumi_open_sanctuary_reflections(p_params jsonb)
 RETURNS jsonb
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
 SECURITY DEFINER
 SET search_path TO ''public''
AS $function$
DECLARE v_user_id uuid; v_items jsonb; v_node jsonb;
BEGIN
 p_params:=public.lumi_normalize_params(COALESCE(p_params,''{}''::jsonb)); v_user_id:=NULLIF(trim(p_params->>''user_id''),'''')::uuid;
 WITH notes AS (
  SELECT ''sanctuary_item'' source_kind,si.id::text id,COALESCE(e.title,r.title,''Experiencia'') title,
    COALESCE(NULLIF(si.note,''''),NULLIF(si.reflection_text,''''),NULLIF(er.reflection_text,'''')) body,si.updated_at dt,''open_sanctuary_item'' action
  FROM public.sanctuary_items si LEFT JOIN public.experience_runs er ON er.id=si.experience_run_id LEFT JOIN public.experiences e ON e.id=COALESCE(si.experience_id,er.experience_id) LEFT JOIN public.resources r ON r.id=COALESCE(si.resource_id,er.resource_id,e.primary_resource_id)
  WHERE si.user_id=v_user_id AND COALESCE(NULLIF(si.note,''''),NULLIF(si.reflection_text,''''),NULLIF(er.reflection_text,'''')) IS NOT NULL
  UNION ALL
  SELECT ''faro_close'',uaf.id::text,COALESCE(uc.short_label,uaf.faro_text,uaf.faro_key),uaf.close_reflection,uaf.closed_at,''open_faro_journey''
  FROM public.user_area_faros uaf LEFT JOIN public.ui_copy uc ON uc.domain=''faro'' AND uc.lang=''es'' AND uc.key=uaf.faro_key
  WHERE uaf.user_id=v_user_id AND NULLIF(uaf.close_reflection,'''') IS NOT NULL
 )
 SELECT COALESCE(jsonb_agg(jsonb_build_object(''id'',id,''title'',title,''subtitle'',left(body,120),''source_kind'',source_kind,''action'',action) ORDER BY dt DESC),''[]''::jsonb) INTO v_items FROM notes;
 v_node:=public.lumi_get_node(''SANCTUARY_REFLECTIONS'');
 RETURN v_node||jsonb_build_object(''ok'',true,''message'',''Acá están las palabras que fuiste dejando mientras recorrías tu camino.'',
  ''actions'',jsonb_build_array(jsonb_build_object(''label'',''Volver al Santuario'',''action'',''open_sanctuary'',''variant'',''ghost'')),
  ''content_type'',''item_list'',''content'',jsonb_build_object(''type'',''item_list'',''source'',''sanctuary_reflections'',''items'',v_items),
  ''state'',jsonb_build_object(''contentSource'',''sanctuary'',''moduleColor'',''#B88820''));
END; $function$
');

INSERT INTO pg_temp_8.__export_sql (ord, line) VALUES ('374', 'CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.lumi_open_sanctuary_saved(p_params jsonb)
 RETURNS jsonb
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
 SECURITY DEFINER
 SET search_path TO ''public''
AS $function$
DECLARE v_user_id uuid; v_items jsonb; v_node jsonb; v_count int;
BEGIN
  p_params:=public.lumi_normalize_params(COALESCE(p_params,''{}''::jsonb));
  v_user_id:=NULLIF(trim(p_params->>''user_id''),'''')::uuid;
  SELECT COALESCE(jsonb_agg(jsonb_build_object(
    ''id'',si.id::text,
    ''title'',COALESCE(e.title,r.title,''Experiencia guardada''),
    ''subtitle'',CONCAT_WS('' · '',NULLIF(COALESCE(auc.short_label,si.life_area_key,er.life_area_key),''''),
      CASE WHEN COALESCE(si.note,si.reflection_text,er.reflection_text,'''')<>'''' THEN ''con nota'' END),
    ''action'',''open_sanctuary_item'',
    ''experience_run_id'',si.experience_run_id::text,
    ''has_note'',COALESCE(si.note,si.reflection_text,er.reflection_text,'''')<>''''
  ) ORDER BY si.created_at DESC),''[]''::jsonb),count(*)
  INTO v_items,v_count
  FROM public.sanctuary_items si
  LEFT JOIN public.experience_runs er ON er.id=si.experience_run_id
  LEFT JOIN public.experiences e ON e.id=COALESCE(si.experience_id,er.experience_id)
  LEFT JOIN public.resources r ON r.id=COALESCE(si.resource_id,er.resource_id,e.primary_resource_id)
  LEFT JOIN public.ui_copy auc ON auc.domain=''area'' AND auc.lang=''es'' AND auc.key=COALESCE(si.life_area_key,er.life_area_key)
  WHERE si.user_id=v_user_id;

  IF COALESCE(v_count,0)=0 THEN RETURN public.lumi_open_sanctuary(p_params); END IF;
  v_node:=public.lumi_get_node(''SANCTUARY_SAVED_LIST'');
  RETURN v_node||jsonb_build_object(''ok'',true,''code'',''SANCTUARY_SAVED_LIST'',
    ''message'',''Esto es lo que decidiste conservar porque tuvo valor para vos.'',
    ''actions'',jsonb_build_array(jsonb_build_object(''label'',''Volver al Santuario'',''action'',''open_sanctuary'',''variant'',''ghost'')),
    ''content_type'',''item_list'',''content'',jsonb_build_object(''type'',''item_list'',''source'',''sanctuary_saved'',''items'',v_items),
    ''state'',jsonb_build_object(''contentSource'',''sanctuary'',''moduleColor'',''#B88820''));
END; $function$
');

INSERT INTO pg_temp_8.__export_sql (ord, line) VALUES ('377', 'CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.lumi_preview_experience(p_params jsonb)
 RETURNS jsonb
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
 SECURITY DEFINER
AS $function$
DECLARE
  v_user_id        uuid;
  v_experience_id uuid;
  v_experience    record;
  v_resource      record;
  v_node          jsonb;
  v_actions       jsonb;
  v_action        jsonb;
  v_actions_final jsonb := ''[]''::jsonb;
BEGIN
  p_params := COALESCE(p_params, ''{}''::jsonb);

  v_user_id := NULLIF(TRIM(COALESCE(p_params->>''user_id'', '''')), '''')::uuid;
  v_experience_id := NULLIF(TRIM(COALESCE(p_params->>''experience_id'', '''')), '''')::uuid;

  IF v_experience_id IS NULL OR v_user_id IS NULL THEN
    RETURN public.lumi_get_node(''HOME_DEFAULT'')
      || jsonb_build_object(
           ''ok'', false,
           ''error'', ''experience_id requerido'',
           ''state'', ''{}''::jsonb
         );
  END IF;

  SELECT
    e.id,
    e.code,
    e.title,
    e.objective,
    e.pre_text,
    e.post_text,
    e.primary_resource_id,
    e.expected_capability_key,
    e.primary_capability_key,
    e.primary_life_area_key,
    e.hemisphere_key
  INTO v_experience
  FROM public.experiences e
  WHERE e.id = v_experience_id
    AND e.active = true
    AND e.editorial_status IN (''core_mvp'', ''enrichment_mvp'');

  IF NOT FOUND THEN
    RETURN public.lumi_get_node(''HOME_DEFAULT'')
      || jsonb_build_object(
           ''ok'', false,
           ''error'', ''experiencia no encontrada'',
           ''state'', ''{}''::jsonb
         );
  END IF;

  SELECT
    r.id,
    r.title,
    r.format::text,
    r.url,
    r.duration_min,
    r.description_short,
    r.source_kind,
    r.author,
    r.provider,
    r.why_now,
    r.minimum_step,
    r.what_it_is_not,
    r.when_it_helps
  INTO v_resource
  FROM public.resources r
  WHERE r.id = v_experience.primary_resource_id
    AND r.is_active = true
    AND r.status = ''active'';

  v_node := public.lumi_get_node(''EXPERIENCE_PREVIEW'');
  v_actions := COALESCE(v_node->''actions'', ''[]''::jsonb);

  FOR v_action IN SELECT * FROM jsonb_array_elements(v_actions)
  LOOP
    IF v_action->>''action'' = ''open_experience'' THEN
      v_action := v_action || jsonb_build_object(
        ''value'', v_experience.id::text
      );
    END IF;

    v_actions_final := v_actions_final || jsonb_build_array(v_action);
  END LOOP;

  RETURN jsonb_build_object(
    ''ok'',           true,
    ''code'',         ''EXPERIENCE_PREVIEW'',
    ''message'',      COALESCE(v_experience.objective, v_node->>''message'', ''''),
    ''actions'',      v_actions_final,
    ''content_type'', ''activity_detail'',
    ''content'',      jsonb_build_object(
                      ''type'',                    ''activity_detail'',
                      ''detail_kind'',             ''experience_preview'',
                      ''source'',                  ''fuente'',

                      ''experience_id'',           v_experience.id::text,
                      ''title'',                   v_experience.title,
                      ''objective'',               COALESCE(v_experience.objective, ''''),
                      ''pre_text'',                COALESCE(v_experience.pre_text, ''''),
                      ''post_text'',               COALESCE(v_experience.post_text, ''''),

                      ''hemisphere_key'',          COALESCE(v_experience.hemisphere_key, ''''),
                      ''expected_capability_key'', COALESCE(v_experience.expected_capability_key, ''''),
                      ''primary_capability_key'',  COALESCE(v_experience.primary_capability_key, ''''),
                      ''primary_life_area_key'',   COALESCE(v_experience.primary_life_area_key, ''''),

                      ''resource_id'',             COALESCE(v_resource.id::text, ''''),
                      ''resource_title'',          COALESCE(v_resource.title, ''''),
                      ''format'',                  COALESCE(v_resource.format, ''''),
                      ''duration_min'',            COALESCE(v_resource.duration_min, 0),
                      ''description_short'',       COALESCE(v_resource.description_short, ''''),
                      ''author'',                  COALESCE(v_resource.author, ''''),
                      ''provider'',                COALESCE(v_resource.provider, ''''),
                      ''source_kind'',             COALESCE(v_resource.source_kind, ''''),
                      ''url'',                     COALESCE(v_resource.url, ''''),
                      ''why_now'',                 COALESCE(v_resource.why_now, ''''),
                      ''minimum_step'',            COALESCE(v_resource.minimum_step, ''''),
                      ''what_it_is_not'',          COALESCE(v_resource.what_it_is_not, ''''),
                      ''when_it_helps'',           COALESCE(v_resource.when_it_helps, '''')
                    ),
    ''state'',        jsonb_build_object(
                      ''currentResourceId'', COALESCE(v_resource.id::text, ''''),
                      ''contentSource'',     ''fuente''
                    )
  );
END;
$function$
');

INSERT INTO pg_temp_8.__export_sql (ord, line) VALUES ('383', 'CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.lumi_restart_experience(p_params jsonb)
 RETURNS jsonb
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
 SECURITY DEFINER
AS $function$
DECLARE
  v_user_id        uuid;
  v_experience_id  uuid;
  v_sanctuary_item_id uuid;
  v_run_id         uuid;
  v_experience     record;
  v_resource       record;
  v_node           jsonb;
BEGIN
  p_params := public.lumi_normalize_params(COALESCE(p_params, ''{}''::jsonb));

  v_user_id := NULLIF(TRIM(p_params->>''user_id''), '''')::uuid;
  v_experience_id := NULLIF(TRIM(COALESCE(
    p_params->>''value'',
    p_params->>''experience_id''
  )), '''')::uuid;

  v_sanctuary_item_id := NULLIF(TRIM(COALESCE(
    p_params->>''sanctuary_item_id'',
    p_params->>''currentSanctuaryItemId''
  )), '''')::uuid;

  IF v_user_id IS NULL OR v_experience_id IS NULL THEN
    RETURN public.lumi_get_node(''HOME_DEFAULT'')
      || jsonb_build_object(
        ''ok'', false,
        ''error'', ''user_id y experience_id requeridos'',
        ''state'', ''{}''::jsonb
      );
  END IF;

  SELECT
    e.id,
    e.title,
    e.pre_text,
    e.post_text,
    e.primary_resource_id,
    e.hemisphere_key,
    e.primary_life_area_key,
    e.primary_capability_key,
    e.expected_capability_key
  INTO v_experience
  FROM public.experiences e
  WHERE e.id = v_experience_id
    AND e.active = true
    AND e.editorial_status IN (''core_mvp'', ''enrichment_mvp'');

  IF NOT FOUND THEN
    RETURN public.lumi_get_node(''HOME_DEFAULT'')
      || jsonb_build_object(
        ''ok'', false,
        ''error'', ''experience_not_found'',
        ''state'', ''{}''::jsonb
      );
  END IF;

  SELECT
    r.id,
    r.title,
    r.format::text,
    r.url,
    r.duration_min,
    r.description_short,
    r.source_kind,
    r.author,
    r.provider
  INTO v_resource
  FROM public.resources r
  WHERE r.id = v_experience.primary_resource_id
    AND r.is_active = true
    AND r.status = ''active'';

  IF NOT FOUND THEN
    RETURN public.lumi_get_node(''HOME_DEFAULT'')
      || jsonb_build_object(
        ''ok'', false,
        ''error'', ''resource_not_found'',
        ''state'', ''{}''::jsonb
      );
  END IF;

  IF v_sanctuary_item_id IS NULL THEN
    SELECT si.id
    INTO v_sanctuary_item_id
    FROM public.sanctuary_items si
    WHERE si.user_id = v_user_id
      AND si.experience_id = v_experience_id
      AND si.experience_run_id IS NOT NULL
    ORDER BY si.created_at DESC
    LIMIT 1;
  END IF;

  INSERT INTO public.experience_runs (
    user_id,
    experience_id,
    resource_id,
    hemisphere_key,
    life_area_key,
    primary_life_area_key,
    selected_capability_key,
    expected_capability_key,
    primary_capability_key,
    hypothesis_json,
    started_at
  ) VALUES (
    v_user_id,
    v_experience_id,
    v_resource.id,
    v_experience.hemisphere_key,
    v_experience.primary_life_area_key,
    v_experience.primary_life_area_key,
    COALESCE(v_experience.primary_capability_key, v_experience.expected_capability_key),
    v_experience.expected_capability_key,
    COALESCE(v_experience.primary_capability_key, v_experience.expected_capability_key),
    jsonb_build_object(
      ''source'', ''sanctuary_replay'',
      ''sanctuary_item_id'', COALESCE(v_sanctuary_item_id::text, ''''),
      ''experience_id'', v_experience_id,
      ''hemisphere_key'', v_experience.hemisphere_key,
      ''primary_life_area_key'', v_experience.primary_life_area_key,
      ''primary_capability_key'', v_experience.primary_capability_key,
      ''expected_capability_key'', v_experience.expected_capability_key,
      ''opened_at'', now()
    ),
    now()
  )
  RETURNING id INTO v_run_id;

  v_node := public.lumi_get_node(''EXPERIENCE_PRE'');

  RETURN jsonb_build_object(
    ''ok'', true,
    ''code'', ''EXPERIENCE_PRE'',
    ''message'', COALESCE(v_experience.pre_text, v_node->>''message'', ''Cuando estés listo, empezamos.''),
    ''actions'', COALESCE(v_node->''actions'', ''[]''::jsonb),
    ''content_type'', ''empty_presence'',
    ''content'', jsonb_build_object(
      ''type'', ''empty_presence'',
      ''experience_id'', v_experience.id::text,
      ''run_id'', v_run_id::text,
      ''experience_run_id'', v_run_id::text,
      ''sanctuary_item_id'', COALESCE(v_sanctuary_item_id::text, ''''),
      ''capability_key'', COALESCE(v_experience.primary_capability_key, v_experience.expected_capability_key),
      ''expected_capability_key'', v_experience.expected_capability_key,
      ''resource_id'', v_resource.id::text,
      ''resource_title'', v_resource.title,
      ''resource_format'', v_resource.format,
      ''resource_url'', v_resource.url,
      ''post_text'', v_experience.post_text
    ),
    ''state'', jsonb_build_object(
      ''currentResourceId'', v_resource.id::text,
      ''currentExperienceRunId'', v_run_id::text,
      ''currentSanctuaryItemId'', COALESCE(v_sanctuary_item_id::text, ''''),
      ''contentSource'', ''sanctuary''
    )
  );
END;
$function$
');

INSERT INTO pg_temp_8.__export_sql (ord, line) VALUES ('385', 'CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.lumi_save_experience_to_sanctuary(p_run_id uuid, p_note text DEFAULT NULL::text)
 RETURNS jsonb
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
 SECURITY DEFINER
AS $function$
DECLARE
  v_run        record;
  v_item_id    uuid;
  v_node       jsonb;
  v_faro_label text;
BEGIN
  SELECT
    er.user_id,
    er.session_id,
    er.experience_id,
    er.resource_id,
    er.help_signal,
    er.reflection_text,
    er.hemisphere_key,
    er.life_area_key,
    er.faro_key,
    er.user_area_faro_id,
    er.faro_text_snapshot,
    er.expected_capability_key,
    er.perceived_capability_key,
    er.selected_capability_key,
    er.experience_hypothesis_id,
    er.hypothesis_json
  INTO v_run
  FROM public.experience_runs er
  WHERE er.id = p_run_id;

  IF NOT FOUND THEN
    RAISE EXCEPTION ''experience_run no encontrado: %'', p_run_id;
  END IF;

  SELECT id
  INTO v_item_id
  FROM public.sanctuary_items
  WHERE experience_run_id = p_run_id
  LIMIT 1;

  IF v_item_id IS NULL THEN
    IF v_run.faro_text_snapshot IS NOT NULL THEN
      v_faro_label := v_run.faro_text_snapshot;
    ELSIF v_run.faro_key IS NOT NULL THEN
      SELECT uc.short_label
      INTO v_faro_label
      FROM public.ui_copy uc
      WHERE uc.domain = ''faro''
        AND uc.lang = ''es''
        AND uc.key = v_run.faro_key
      LIMIT 1;
    END IF;

    INSERT INTO public.sanctuary_items (
      user_id,
      resource_id,
      experience_run_id,
      experience_id,
      reflection_text,
      help_signal,
      note,
      life_area_key,
      user_area_faro_id,
      selected_capability_key,
      expected_capability_key,
      perceived_capability_key,
      faro_key,
      faro_text_snapshot,
      hypothesis_json
    ) VALUES (
      v_run.user_id,
      v_run.resource_id,
      p_run_id,
      v_run.experience_id,
      COALESCE(p_note, v_run.reflection_text),
      v_run.help_signal,
      p_note,
      v_run.life_area_key,
      v_run.user_area_faro_id,
      v_run.selected_capability_key,
      v_run.expected_capability_key,
      v_run.perceived_capability_key,
      v_run.faro_key,
      v_faro_label,
      v_run.hypothesis_json
    )
    RETURNING id INTO v_item_id;

    UPDATE public.experience_runs
    SET saved_to_sanctuary = true
    WHERE id = p_run_id;
  END IF;

  v_node := public.lumi_get_node(''SANCTUARY_SAVED'');

  RETURN jsonb_build_object(
    ''ok'', true,
    ''code'', ''SANCTUARY_SAVED'',
    ''sanctuary_item_id'', v_item_id,
    ''message'', COALESCE(v_node->>''message'', ''Guardado en tu Santuario. Podés volver cuando quieras.''),
    ''actions'', COALESCE(v_node->''actions'', ''[]''::jsonb),
    ''content_type'', ''empty_presence'',
    ''content'', jsonb_build_object(
      ''type'', ''empty_presence'',
      ''sanctuary_item_id'', v_item_id::text,
      ''experience_run_id'', p_run_id::text
    ),
    ''state'', jsonb_build_object(
      ''contentSource'', ''sanctuary'',
      ''moduleColor'', ''#B88820'',
      ''currentSanctuaryItemId'', v_item_id::text,
      ''currentExperienceRunId'', p_run_id::text,
      ''currentResourceId'', COALESCE(v_run.resource_id::text, '''')
    )
  );
END;
$function$
');

INSERT INTO pg_temp_8.__export_sql (ord, line) VALUES ('500', 'CREATE INDEX users_instance_id_idx ON auth.users USING btree (instance_id);');

INSERT INTO pg_temp_8.__export_sql (ord, line) VALUES ('390', 'CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.lumi_select_experience(p_user_id uuid, p_session_id uuid DEFAULT NULL::uuid, p_state_key text DEFAULT NULL::text, p_area text DEFAULT NULL::text, p_time_bucket text DEFAULT NULL::text, p_hemisphere text DEFAULT NULL::text, p_capability text DEFAULT NULL::text, p_faro_key text DEFAULT NULL::text)
 RETURNS jsonb
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
 SECURITY DEFINER
AS $function$
DECLARE
  v_run_id              uuid;
  v_experience          record;
  v_resource            record;
  v_hypothesis          record;
  v_max_mins            integer := 999;
  v_position            smallint := 1;
  v_hypothesis_json     jsonb;
  v_format_preference   text;
  v_user_area_faro_id   uuid;
  v_faro_text_snapshot  text;
BEGIN
  IF p_user_id IS NULL THEN
    RAISE EXCEPTION ''p_user_id requerido'';
  END IF;

  IF p_session_id IS NOT NULL THEN
    SELECT
      COALESCE(p_hemisphere, s.hemisphere_key),
      COALESCE(p_capability, s.selected_capability_key),
      COALESCE(p_faro_key, s.faro_key),
      COALESCE(p_area, s.area::text),
      COALESCE(p_state_key, s.state_key),
      COALESCE(p_time_bucket, s.time_bucket::text),
      s.current_format_preference,
      s.user_area_faro_id,
      COALESCE(
        NULLIF(uaf.faro_text, ''''),
        faro_uc.short_label,
        s.faro_key
      )
    INTO
      p_hemisphere,
      p_capability,
      p_faro_key,
      p_area,
      p_state_key,
      p_time_bucket,
      v_format_preference,
      v_user_area_faro_id,
      v_faro_text_snapshot
    FROM public.sessions s
    LEFT JOIN public.user_area_faros uaf
      ON uaf.id = s.user_area_faro_id
    LEFT JOIN public.ui_copy faro_uc
      ON faro_uc.domain = ''faro''
     AND faro_uc.lang = ''es''
     AND faro_uc.key = s.faro_key
    WHERE s.id = p_session_id
      AND s.user_id = p_user_id;
  END IF;

  IF p_capability IS NULL OR p_capability = '''' THEN
    RETURN jsonb_build_object(
      ''matched'', false,
      ''fallback_reason'', ''no_capability_signal'',
      ''actions'', jsonb_build_array(''open_fuente'', ''go_home'')
    );
  END IF;

  IF p_time_bucket IS NOT NULL THEN
    BEGIN
      v_max_mins := public.lumi_max_minutes(p_time_bucket::public.time_bucket);
    EXCEPTION WHEN OTHERS THEN
      v_max_mins := 999;
    END;
  END IF;

  SELECT COALESCE(MAX(position), 0) + 1
  INTO v_position
  FROM public.session_experience_shown
  WHERE session_id = p_session_id;

  SELECT eh.*
  INTO v_hypothesis
  FROM public.experience_hypotheses eh
  JOIN public.experiences e
    ON e.id = eh.experience_id
   AND e.active = true
   AND e.editorial_status IN (''core_mvp'', ''enrichment_mvp'')
  JOIN public.resources r
    ON r.id = e.primary_resource_id
   AND r.is_active = true
   AND r.status = ''active''
  WHERE eh.active = true
    AND eh.hemisphere_key = p_hemisphere
    AND (eh.life_area_key = p_area OR eh.life_area_key IS NULL)
    AND eh.capability_key = p_capability
    AND eh.expected_capability_key = p_capability
    AND (
      CASE
        WHEN p_hemisphere = ''H1''
          THEN (eh.state_key = p_state_key OR eh.state_key IS NULL)
        WHEN p_hemisphere = ''H2''
          THEN (eh.faro_key = p_faro_key OR eh.faro_key IS NULL)
        ELSE false
      END
    )
    AND r.duration_min <= v_max_mins
    AND (
      v_format_preference IS NULL
      OR v_format_preference = ''''
      OR r.format::text = v_format_preference
    )
    AND NOT EXISTS (
      SELECT 1
      FROM public.session_experience_shown ses
      WHERE ses.session_id = p_session_id
        AND ses.experience_id = e.id
    )
    AND NOT EXISTS (
      SELECT 1
      FROM public.experience_runs er
      WHERE er.user_id = p_user_id
        AND er.experience_id = e.id
        AND er.help_signal = ''no_era_para_mi''
        AND er.started_at > now() - interval ''30 days''
    )
  ORDER BY
    (
      CASE WHEN eh.life_area_key IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
      + CASE WHEN eh.state_key IS NOT NULL OR eh.faro_key IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
    ) DESC,
    eh.priority ASC,
    (
      SELECT MAX(er2.started_at)
      FROM public.experience_runs er2
      WHERE er2.user_id = p_user_id
        AND er2.experience_id = e.id
    ) ASC NULLS FIRST
  LIMIT 1;

  IF v_hypothesis IS NULL THEN
    SELECT
      eh.*,
      r.duration_min AS res_duration,
      r.format::text AS res_format,
      e.title AS exp_title
    INTO v_hypothesis
    FROM public.experience_hypotheses eh
    JOIN public.experiences e
      ON e.id = eh.experience_id
     AND e.active = true
     AND e.editorial_status IN (''core_mvp'', ''enrichment_mvp'')
    JOIN public.resources r
      ON r.id = e.primary_resource_id
     AND r.is_active = true
     AND r.status = ''active''
    WHERE eh.active = true
      AND eh.hemisphere_key = p_hemisphere
      AND (eh.life_area_key = p_area OR eh.life_area_key IS NULL)
      AND eh.capability_key = p_capability
      AND eh.expected_capability_key = p_capability
      AND (
        CASE
          WHEN p_hemisphere = ''H1''
            THEN (eh.state_key = p_state_key OR eh.state_key IS NULL)
          WHEN p_hemisphere = ''H2''
            THEN (eh.faro_key = p_faro_key OR eh.faro_key IS NULL)
          ELSE false
        END
      )
      AND NOT EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM public.session_experience_shown ses
        WHERE ses.session_id = p_session_id
          AND ses.experience_id = e.id
      )
    ORDER BY
      (
        CASE WHEN eh.life_area_key IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
        + CASE WHEN eh.state_key IS NOT NULL OR eh.faro_key IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
      ) DESC,
      eh.priority ASC
    LIMIT 1;

    IF v_hypothesis IS NOT NULL THEN
      IF v_hypothesis.res_duration > v_max_mins THEN
        RETURN jsonb_build_object(
          ''matched'', false,
          ''fallback_reason'', ''time_mismatch'',
          ''experience_id'', v_hypothesis.experience_id,
          ''experience_title'', v_hypothesis.exp_title,
          ''required_mins'', v_hypothesis.res_duration,
          ''available_mins'', v_max_mins,
          ''capability_key'', p_capability,
          ''negotiation_msg'',
            ''Tengo algo que puede ayudarte, pero lleva '' ||
            v_hypothesis.res_duration::text ||
            '' minutos. Dijiste que tenés '' ||
            v_max_mins::text ||
            ''. ¿Querés tomarlo igual?'',
          ''actions'', jsonb_build_array(''accept_time_anyway'', ''find_shorter'', ''go_home'')
        );
      END IF;

      IF v_format_preference IS NOT NULL
         AND v_format_preference <> ''''
         AND v_hypothesis.res_format <> v_format_preference THEN
        RETURN jsonb_build_object(
          ''matched'', false,
          ''fallback_reason'', ''format_mismatch'',
          ''experience_id'', v_hypothesis.experience_id,
          ''experience_title'', v_hypothesis.exp_title,
          ''required_format'', v_hypothesis.res_format,
          ''preferred_format'', v_format_preference,
          ''capability_key'', p_capability,
          ''negotiation_msg'',
            ''Tengo algo que puede ayudarte, pero está en formato '' ||
            v_hypothesis.res_format ||
            ''. ¿Querés tomarlo igual o preferís buscar otro formato?'',
          ''actions'', jsonb_build_array(''accept_format_anyway'', ''find_other_format'', ''go_home'')
        );
      END IF;
    END IF;
  END IF;

  IF v_hypothesis IS NULL THEN
    IF p_session_id IS NOT NULL THEN
      UPDATE public.sessions
      SET
        last_no_match_at                = now(),
        last_no_match_reason            = ''no_hypothesis_found'',
        last_no_match_hemisphere_key    = p_hemisphere,
        last_no_match_life_area_key     = p_area,
        last_no_match_state_key         = p_state_key,
        last_no_match_faro_key          = p_faro_key,
        last_no_match_capability_key    = p_capability,
        last_no_match_time_bucket       = p_time_bucket,
        last_no_match_format_preference = v_format_preference
      WHERE id = p_session_id
        AND user_id = p_user_id;

      INSERT INTO public.session_events (
        session_id,
        user_id,
        event_type,
        event_data,
        created_at
      )
      VALUES (
        p_session_id,
        p_user_id,
        ''no_hypothesis_found'',
        jsonb_build_object(
          ''source'', ''lumi_select_experience'',
          ''hemisphere'', p_hemisphere,
          ''area'', p_area,
          ''state_key'', p_state_key,
          ''faro_key'', p_faro_key,
          ''capability'', p_capability,
          ''time_bucket'', p_time_bucket,
          ''format_preference'', v_format_preference
        ),
        now()
      );
    END IF;

    RETURN jsonb_build_object(
      ''matched'', false,
      ''fallback_reason'', ''no_hypothesis_found'',
      ''hemisphere'', p_hemisphere,
      ''area'', p_area,
      ''state_key'', p_state_key,
      ''faro_key'', p_faro_key,
      ''capability'', p_capability,
      ''actions'', jsonb_build_array(''open_fuente'', ''go_home'')
    );
  END IF;

  SELECT
    e.id,
    e.code,
    e.title,
    e.pre_text,
    e.post_text,
    e.primary_resource_id,
    e.expected_capability_key
  INTO v_experience
  FROM public.experiences e
  WHERE e.id = v_hypothesis.experience_id;

  SELECT
    r.id,
    r.title,
    r.format::text,
    r.url,
    r.duration_min,
    r.description_short,
    r.source_kind,
    r.author,
    r.provider,
    r.why_now,
    r.minimum_step,
    r.after_prompt
  INTO v_resource
  FROM public.resources r
  WHERE r.id = v_experience.primary_resource_id;

  v_hypothesis_json := jsonb_build_object(
    ''source'', ''lumi_motor'',
    ''hypothesis_id'', v_hypothesis.id,
    ''hemisphere'', p_hemisphere,
    ''area'', p_area,
    ''state_key'', p_state_key,
    ''faro_key'', p_faro_key,
    ''capability_key'', p_capability,
    ''expected_capability_key'', v_hypothesis.expected_capability_key,
    ''time_bucket'', p_time_bucket,
    ''format_preference'', v_format_preference,
    ''priority'', v_hypothesis.priority,
    ''matched_at'', now()
  );

  INSERT INTO public.experience_runs (
    user_id,
    session_id,
    experience_id,
    resource_id,
    hemisphere_key,
    life_area_key,
    state_key,
    faro_key,
    user_area_faro_id,
    faro_text_snapshot,
    selected_capability_key,
    expected_capability_key,
    experience_hypothesis_id,
    hypothesis_json,
    current_format_preference,
    started_at
  ) VALUES (
    p_user_id,
    p_session_id,
    v_experience.id,
    v_resource.id,
    p_hemisphere,
    p_area,
    p_state_key,
    p_faro_key,
    v_user_area_faro_id,
    v_faro_text_snapshot,
    p_capability,
    v_hypothesis.expected_capability_key,
    v_hypothesis.id,
    v_hypothesis_json,
    v_format_preference,
    now()
  )
  RETURNING id INTO v_run_id;

  IF p_session_id IS NOT NULL THEN
    INSERT INTO public.session_experience_shown (
      session_id,
      experience_id,
      position,
      shown_at
    ) VALUES (
      p_session_id,
      v_experience.id,
      v_position,
      now()
    )
    ON CONFLICT (session_id, experience_id) DO NOTHING;

    UPDATE public.sessions
    SET selected_experience_id = v_experience.id
    WHERE id = p_session_id
      AND user_id = p_user_id;
  END IF;

  RETURN jsonb_build_object(
    ''matched'', true,
    ''run_id'', v_run_id,
    ''experience_id'', v_experience.id,
    ''experience_code'', v_experience.code,
    ''title'', v_experience.title,
    ''pre_text'', v_experience.pre_text,
    ''post_text'', v_experience.post_text,
    ''capability_key'', p_capability,
    ''expected_capability'', v_hypothesis.expected_capability_key,
    ''hypothesis_id'', v_hypothesis.id,
    ''resource'', jsonb_build_object(
      ''id'', v_resource.id,
      ''title'', v_resource.title,
      ''format'', v_resource.format,
      ''url'', v_resource.url,
      ''duration_min'', v_resource.duration_min,
      ''description_short'', v_resource.description_short,
      ''source_kind'', v_resource.source_kind,
      ''author'', v_resource.author,
      ''provider'', v_resource.provider,
      ''why_now'', v_resource.why_now,
      ''minimum_step'', v_resource.minimum_step,
      ''after_prompt'', v_resource.after_prompt
    )
  );
END;
$function$
');

INSERT INTO pg_temp_8.__export_sql (ord, line) VALUES ('393', 'CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.lumi_show_register_form(p_params jsonb)

INSERT INTO pg_temp_8.__export_sql (ord, line) VALUES ('398', 'CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.lumi_start_shared_light(p_params jsonb)
 RETURNS jsonb
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
 SECURITY DEFINER
 SET search_path TO ''public''
AS $function$
DECLARE
  v_token              text;
  v_share              record;
  v_viewer             jsonb;
  v_content            jsonb;
  v_state              jsonb;
  v_node               jsonb;
  v_user_id            uuid;
  v_auth_user_id       uuid;
  v_receiver_run_id    uuid;
BEGIN
  p_params := public.lumi_normalize_params(COALESCE(p_params, ''{}''::jsonb));

  v_token := NULLIF(TRIM(COALESCE(
    p_params->>''share_token'',
    p_params->>''currentShareToken'',
    p_params->>''value'',
    ''''
  )), '''');

  v_user_id := NULLIF(TRIM(COALESCE(p_params->>''user_id'', '''')), '''')::uuid;
  v_auth_user_id := auth.uid();
  v_user_id := COALESCE(v_user_id, v_auth_user_id);

  IF v_token IS NULL THEN
    v_node := public.lumi_get_node(''SHARED_LIGHT_NOT_FOUND'');
    RETURN v_node || jsonb_build_object(
      ''ok'', false,
      ''code'', ''SHARED_LIGHT_NOT_FOUND'',
      ''content_type'', ''empty_presence'',
      ''content'', COALESCE(v_node->''content'', jsonb_build_object(''type'', ''empty_presence'')),
      ''state'', ''{}''::jsonb
    );
  END IF;

  SELECT *
  INTO v_share
  FROM public.share_light_circulations
  WHERE share_token = v_token
    AND status NOT IN (''revoked'', ''expired'')
    AND (expires_at IS NULL OR expires_at > now())
  LIMIT 1;

  IF NOT FOUND OR v_share.resource_id IS NULL THEN
    v_node := public.lumi_get_node(''SHARED_LIGHT_NOT_FOUND'');
    RETURN v_node || jsonb_build_object(
      ''ok'', false,
      ''code'', ''SHARED_LIGHT_NOT_FOUND'',
      ''content_type'', ''empty_presence'',
      ''content'', COALESCE(v_node->''content'', jsonb_build_object(''type'', ''empty_presence'')),
      ''state'', jsonb_build_object(
        ''contentSource'', ''shared_light'',
        ''currentShareLightId'', COALESCE(v_share.id::text, ''''),
        ''currentShareToken'', COALESCE(v_share.share_token, v_token),
        ''currentExperienceId'', COALESCE(v_share.experience_id::text, ''''),
        ''currentResourceId'', COALESCE(v_share.resource_id::text, '''')
      )
    );
  END IF;

  /*
    Run propio del receptor.
    No se guarda el run del emisor en el Santuario del receptor.
    El run fuente queda en share_light_circulations.experience_run_id.
    El receptor recibe un nuevo experience_runs vinculado por metadata.
  */
  INSERT INTO public.experience_runs (
    user_id,
    session_id,
    experience_id,
    resource_id,
    started_at,
    metadata,
    saved_to_sanctuary,
    hypothesis_json
  )
  VALUES (
    v_user_id,
    NULL,
    v_share.experience_id,
    v_share.resource_id,
    now(),
    jsonb_build_object(
      ''source_hint'', ''shared_light_receiver'',
      ''share_light_id'', v_share.id::text,
      ''share_token'', v_share.share_token,
      ''source_experience_run_id'', COALESCE(v_share.experience_run_id::text, ''''),
      ''source_sanctuary_item_id'', COALESCE(v_share.sanctuary_item_id::text, ''''),
      ''created_by_user_id'', COALESCE(v_share.created_by_user_id::text, '''')
    ),
    false,
    jsonb_build_object(
      ''source'', ''shared_light'',
      ''share_light_id'', v_share.id::text,
      ''share_token'', v_share.share_token,
      ''source_experience_run_id'', COALESCE(v_share.experience_run_id::text, ''''),
      ''experience_id'', COALESCE(v_share.experience_id::text, ''''),
      ''resource_id'', COALESCE(v_share.resource_id::text, '''')
    )
  )
  RETURNING id INTO v_receiver_run_id;

  INSERT INTO public.share_light_events (
    share_light_id, user_id, session_id, event_type, channel, surface, success, metadata
  )
  VALUES (
    v_share.id,
    v_user_id,
    NULL,
    ''opened'',
    ''link'',
    ''unknown'',
    true,
    jsonb_build_object(
      ''anonymous'', v_user_id IS NULL,
      ''step'', ''resource_started'',
      ''receiver_experience_run_id'', v_receiver_run_id::text
    )
  );

  v_viewer := public.lumi_open_resource_viewer(jsonb_build_object(
    ''resource_id'', v_share.resource_id::text,
    ''source'', ''shared_light'',
    ''share_token'', v_share.share_token,
    ''share_light_id'', v_share.id::text,
    ''experience_id'', COALESCE(v_share.experience_id::text, ''''),
    ''experience_run_id'', v_receiver_run_id::text,
    ''currentExperienceRunId'', v_receiver_run_id::text,
    ''user_id'', COALESCE(v_user_id::text, '''')
  ));

  IF COALESCE((v_viewer->>''ok'')::boolean, false) IS NOT TRUE THEN
    v_node := public.lumi_get_node(''SHARED_LIGHT_NOT_FOUND'');
    RETURN v_node || jsonb_build_object(
      ''ok'', false,
      ''code'', ''SHARED_LIGHT_NOT_FOUND'',
      ''content_type'', ''empty_presence'',
      ''content'', COALESCE(v_node->''content'', jsonb_build_object(''type'', ''empty_presence'')),
      ''state'', COALESCE(v_viewer->''state'', ''{}''::jsonb) || jsonb_build_object(
        ''contentSource'', ''shared_light'',
        ''currentShareLightId'', v_share.id::text,
        ''currentShareToken'', v_share.share_token,
        ''currentResourceId'', v_share.resource_id::text,
        ''currentExperienceId'', COALESCE(v_share.experience_id::text, ''''),
        ''currentExperienceRunId'', v_receiver_run_id::text,
        ''experience_run_id'', v_receiver_run_id::text
      )
    );
  END IF;

  v_content := COALESCE(v_viewer->''content'', ''{}''::jsonb)
    || jsonb_build_object(
      ''source'', ''shared_light'',
      ''shared_light'', true,
      ''anonymous_allowed'', true,
      ''share_light_id'', v_share.id::text,
      ''share_token'', v_share.share_token,
      ''experience_id'', COALESCE(v_share.experience_id::text, ''''),
      ''resource_id'', v_share.resource_id::text,
      ''experience_run_id'', v_receiver_run_id::text,
      ''currentExperienceRunId'', v_receiver_run_id::text
    );

  v_state := COALESCE(v_viewer->''state'', ''{}''::jsonb)
    || jsonb_build_object(
      ''contentSource'', ''shared_light'',
      ''currentShareLightId'', v_share.id::text,
      ''currentShareToken'', v_share.share_token,
      ''currentResourceId'', v_share.resource_id::text,
      ''currentExperienceId'', COALESCE(v_share.experience_id::text, ''''),
      ''currentExperienceRunId'', v_receiver_run_id::text,
      ''experience_run_id'', v_receiver_run_id::text
    );

  v_node := public.lumi_get_node(''SHARED_LIGHT_RESOURCE'');

  RETURN v_node || jsonb_build_object(
    ''ok'', true,
    ''code'', ''SHARED_LIGHT_RESOURCE'',
    ''content_type'', ''resource_viewer'',
    ''content'', v_content,
    ''state'', v_state
  );
END;
$function$
');

INSERT INTO pg_temp_8.__export_sql (ord, line) VALUES ('429', 'CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION storage.allow_any_operation(expected_operations text[])
 RETURNS boolean
 LANGUAGE sql
 STABLE
AS $function$
  WITH current_operation AS (
    SELECT storage.operation() AS raw_operation
  ),
  normalized AS (
    SELECT CASE
      WHEN raw_operation LIKE ''storage.%'' THEN substr(raw_operation, 9)
      ELSE raw_operation
    END AS current_operation
    FROM current_operation
  )
  SELECT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM normalized n
    CROSS JOIN LATERAL unnest(expected_operations) AS expected_operation
    WHERE expected_operation IS NOT NULL
      AND expected_operation <> ''''
      AND n.current_operation = CASE
        WHEN expected_operation LIKE ''storage.%'' THEN substr(expected_operation, 9)
        ELSE expected_operation
      END
  );
$function$
');
